spells.name: 火曜日
spells.description: A blazing flame consumes the enemy!

spells.name: 水曜日
spells.description: A devastating torrent sweeps the enemy away!

spells.name: 木曜日
spells.description: The forest closes in and smothers the enemy!

spells.name: 金曜日
spells.description: A razor-sharp blade pierces the enemy!

spells.name: 土曜日
spells.description: The earth trembles and swallows the enemy whole!

spells.name: 日曜日
spells.description: Solar light blinds and burns the enemy!

spells.name: 月曜日
spells.description: The lunar shadow envelops and paralyzes the enemy!

spells.name: 火山
spells.description: A volcanic eruption devastates the enemy!

spells.name: 山川
spells.description: Untamed nature crashes down upon the enemy!

spells.name: 川水
spells.description: Raging currents sweep the enemy away!

spells.name: 金山
spells.description: Shards of metal pierce through the enemy!

spells.name: 日月
spells.description: The radiance of the sun and moon strikes the enemy!

spells.name: 水火
spells.description: Scalding steam — water and fire merge into one!

spells.name: 土木
spells.description: Earth and wood unite to crush the enemy!
